description: Minimal Tauri 2 capability set. Only the typed IPC commands, opener (system browser only), autostart, and a scoped shell:allow-spawn for the named 'rah-bridge-sidecar' binary with a fixed empty argv are exposed (Rust calls Command::spawn(), so this is the required permission — never shell:allow-execute). No generic shell execution, no arbitrary binaries, no user-controlled args, no fs, no http, no dialog, no notification, no clipboard, no process control, no OS admin surface.
